briefdescription.para: set graph userdata similar to DB_SetUserData()

parameterdescription.para: name of main window or external subwindow in SweepBrowser
index into the sweep browser map, equal to the index into the popup menu (0-based)

simplesect.para: wave with the setting for each headstage or an invalid wave reference if the setting does not exist

briefdescription.para: Return a list of experiments from which the sweeps in the sweep browser graph originated from.
Return a text wave with information about the channel waves of the sweep browser graph of all or a specific experiment.

detaileddescription.para: The returned textwave will have multiple columns with different information on each wave.

Rows:
One entry for each wave

Columns:
0: channel number
1: absolute path to the wave
2: headstage

para.verbatim: embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * variable channelNumber, headstage, numWaves, i * string graph = "SweepBrowser1" // name of an existing sweep browser graph * string channel = "DA" * WAVE/T wv = SB_GetChannelInfoFromGraph(graph, channel) * * numWaves = DimSize(wv, ROWS) * for(i = 0; i < numWaves; i += 1) * WAVE data = $(wv[i][%path]) * channelNumber = str2num(wv[i][%channel]) * headstage = str2num(wv[i][%headstage]) * * printf "Channel %d acquired by headstage %d is stored in %s\r", channelNumber, headstage, NameOfWave(data) * endfor *

parameterdescription.para: name of main window or external subwindow in SweepBrowser
type of the channel, one of XOP_CHANNEL_NAMES
[optional, defaults to all] name of the experiment the channel wave should originate from

memberdef.argsstring: (dfref sweepBrowser, string fileName, string dataFolder, string device, variable sweep)
memberdef.name: SB_AddToSweepBrowser

briefdescription.para: Returns a numeric wave with all sweep numbers.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, variable logbookType, variable logbookWaveType, variable sweepNumber=defaultValue, string dataFolder=defaultValue, string device=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SB_GetLogbookWave

briefdescription.para: Generic getter for the labnotebook waves.

detaileddescription.para:
Use case 1 ( only):
No optional parameters given: Returns a wave reference wave with all labnotebook waves from all displayed sweeps, ordered by index

Use case 2 (LBT_LABNOTEBOOK only):
sweepNumber given: Return the labnotebook wave of that sweep only

Use case 3:
dataFolder and device given: Return the labnotebook for the given nwb/pxp data folder and device combination

listitem.para: Return one of the four results waves from the given nwb/pxp data folder

simplesect.para: valid labnotebook wave or a null wave in case it does not exist

briefdescription.para: SB Visualization of sweep data in the analysis browser
